name: tradesearcher-agent-tools
description: TradeSearcher CLI, SDK, and MCP server for coding agents

scripts.check: node --check packages/core/src/index.js && node --check packages/cli/src/index.js && node --check packages/mcp-server/src/index.js
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run build && npm run pack:dry-run
